objective: Reproduce the announced polynomial map in three variables, verify that its Jacobian determinant is the nonzero constant -2, and verify that three distinct rational points have the same image.
completion_criteria: Exact symbolic identity and three rational witness evaluations
non_results: Finite computation outside its stated range is not a proof of a universal claim.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
Restating a known reduction, checking examples, or giving an unproved key lemma is not terminal success.
synthesis_summary: Independent reproduction returned determinant -2 and the same image (-1/4, 0, 0) for all three distinct inputs.

strategies.title: Differentiate the three displayed coordinate polynomials symbolically, factor the determinant, then evaluate the map at the three announced rational points using exact arithmetic.
strategies.mechanism: Differentiate the three displayed coordinate polynomials symbolically, factor the determinant, then evaluate the map at the three announced rational points using exact arithmetic.

next_session.objective: Package the script and dependency lock as the calibration certificate.
next_session.first_action: Package the script and dependency lock as the calibration certificate.
